name: Convex Finance
special_mechanism_summary: Convex wraps Curve LP positions to distribute boosted CRV without requiring individual LPs to lock veCRV. cvxCRV is a permanently locked CRV wrapper, while vlCVX (vote-locked CVX) controls how Convex votes its ~53% veCRV stash. The 16-week vlCVX lock commits vote allocation for 16 weeks, enabling a forward-looking bribery market via Votium/Hidden Hand.
notes: C3' combination potential: cvxCRV is perpetually locked — cvxCRV/CRV peg depends on secondary market demand, and depeg affects downstream protocols accepting cvxCRV at 1:1 parity; 16-week vlCVX lock creates predictable governance epochs for modeling over/under-weighted Curve pools; Votium/Hidden Hand bribery market prices gauge votes on-chain, creating information asymmetry for gauge-aware strategies that can infer protocol demand for specific pool liquidity.
